statement.normalized: Let\[f(n)=\min_{1<k\leq n/2}\textrm{gcd}\left(n,\binom{n}{k}\right).\]{UL} {LI}Characterise those composite $n$ such that $f(n)=n/P(n)$, where $P(n)$ is the largest prime dividing $n$.{/LI} {LI}Are there infinitely many composite $n$ such that $f(n)>n^{1/2}$?{/LI} {LI} Is it true that, for every composite $n$,\[f(n) \ll_A \frac{n}{(\log n)^A}\]for every $A>0$?{/LI} {/UL}
